title.default: Arcachon Tourism | Myriam Madec, Official Tour Guide, Arcachon Bay

metadata.description: Discover Arcachon Bay with Myriam Madec, official tour guide since 1994. Walking, cycling and boat tours: Arcachon, Dune du Pilat, Cap Ferret, Bird Island.

about.quote: "Making your stay an enriching and unforgettable experience, that's been my mission for 30 years."
about.bio: Passionate about archaeology since childhood, Myriam discovered her true calling in sharing knowledge. She knows Arcachon Bay inside out: from the tchanquées huts to the archaeological digs beneath the Dune du Pilat, from the fish markets at dawn to the hidden paths of the Ville d'Hiver.
about.credential3: Member of FNGIC & Guides de Nouvelle-Aquitaine
about.credential4: Tours in French, English and Spanish

cta.phoneDesc: Available every day to answer your questions.

mesVisites.description: Walking through the streets of the Ville d'Hiver, cycling along the coast, or sailing to Bird Island. Every tour is a meeting with the Bay.
